summary.title: Add mainline.sh links to README headers
summary.what: Added Website, Docs, Spec, and Essay links near the top of README.md and README.zh.md.
summary.why: The website launch needs GitHub README links as early external signals and as a direct path from the product repo to the canonical mainline.sh pages.
summary.user_goal: Add mainline.sh links to the main product README as part of the SEO launch checklist.

decisions.chose: Use a compact four-item link list below the badges in both English and Chinese READMEs.
decisions.rationale: The links are visible in the first screen without changing the existing product positioning or adding buyer-oriented copy.

decisions.chose: Link to the canonical domain mainline.sh for website, docs, spec, and the repo-memory essay.
decisions.rationale: mainline.sh is now the primary SEO domain and should receive the GitHub backlink.

acknowledged_constraints.note: The README addition is limited to navigation links and does not introduce buyer/persona or paid-buyer framing.

review_notes: Docs-only change; verified with git diff --check and make hygiene.

behavioral_changes: GitHub README first screen now links to https://mainline.sh, /docs/, /spec/, and the first repo-memory essay.
Chinese README mirrors the same canonical links with natural Chinese labels.
